title: 1550 Unknown Live
Notes: 17DEC2022 SLF changed species from Chinook to Unknown. Finding Chinook in the park is extremely rare and combining with the fact that we never found a Chinook carcass it's more likely that this was a Coho

title: 280 Chum Dead
Notes: 22DEC2022 SLF set type to Dead based on the presence of carcass data
